page.content: The table presents various variables related to physical performance and activity measures, detailing their median values and interquartile ranges (IQR). The first variable, 6MWT (distance in meters), has a median of 345.5 with an IQR of 264.0-418.7. Under the category of Functional ability measures, the Berg balance Scale (max 56 points) shows a median of 54.0 and an IQR of 50.2-56.0. The Chedoke-McMaster leg and foot impairment (max 14 points) has a median of 14.0 with an IQR of 14.0-14.0. The accelerometer measures total activity in kilocounts per day with a median of 21.5 and an IQR of 10.4-74.9. Active Energy expenditure is recorded at a median of 98.1 kcal/day, with an IQR of 60.8-245.7. The PASIPD (MET hr/d) (max 199.5) has a median of 10.3 and an IQR of 6.1-17.1. For PASIPD Categories (items) (min-max possible MET hr/d), the median is not applicable as it is marked with a dash, indicating no specific value. Leisure Activities (1-6) yield a median of 4.5 with an IQR of 2.4-10.9, while Household activities (7-12) report a median of 0.6 and an IQR of 0.0-2.3. Finally, Work/Volunteer (13) has a median of 0.0 with an IQR of 0.0-0.0.

interquartile ranges (IQR). The first variable, 6MWT (distance in meters), has a median of 345.5 with an IQR of 264.0-418.7.
Under the category of Functional ability measures, the Berg balance Scale (max 56 points) shows a median of 54.0 and an IQR

The accelerometer measures total activity in kilocounts per day with a median of 21.5 and an IQR of 10.4-74.9. Active Energy
